notes: Hidden board, RUST_CODE.BBS, dial 5550106. A Small Wood board. The enemy reads here. Frasier rarely posts; he reads. Threads document the enemy's footprint in Small Wood from the enemy's side of the fence. Skeleton — 3 threads.

threads.subject: the cypress at the southwest corner of the small wood is dying

op.body:
Soil sample came back. The cypress at the southwest corner is dying because the table is dropping — not because of anything we did. The roots are reaching for water that isn't where it was three years ago.

Three seasons and the cypress is gone whatever we do. We do not need to do anything to it. We do not need to be near it. We let the table drop.

— g.

threads.subject: the seed-dying rate this season is on schedule

op.body:
Quarterly. Seed-dying in Small Wood is on schedule. Three seeds in May, three in June, the projection holds for July. The cottonwood is incidental — the cottonwood was not on our list.

The forest will look the way the forest is meant to look by Labor Day. The forest looking the way the forest is meant to look is the way the forest will look every year hereafter.

The HOA's August schedule is enclosed.

threads.subject: an outside reader is on the line tonight

op.body:
Note for the room. The line shows an outside reader has joined the board. The reader has dialed in three of the last four Sundays. The reader has not posted. The reader is reading.

We will not move the board. We will not change the dial. The reader is welcome to read. The reader is reading what the reader is welcome to read.

— g.
